title: Create: Fantasy
description: A brand new Minecraft experience, with all new terrain generation, tons of structures and fantasy aspects.
body:
![Create : Fantay Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21d207ffe61b05d7be21c3ae67f16659ee67a02c.png)
> _A fantasy-themed modpack, specializing in Create and Origins._
 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 Whenever you awake upon a brand new world, you're randomly given an Origin with special abilities to give you an edge on the challenging world ahead of you, although you only have **six** lives, so be careful cause in the case of death you're given a brand new origin and 
 you're one step closer to **Game Over**.
 
  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 **FEATURES:**

 - **Create**, and addons allowing you to create impressive mechanical structures.
- **Origins**, giving you a randomized ability to use.
- **Seasons**, make sure to keep warm during the winter, and pay attention to crop season.
- **Farmer's Delight & More**, an additonal way to grow crops, and cook food aswell as a new way to fish brought by the mod, **Fishingreal**.
- **Terrain Generation**, A few mods, completely revamp the original Minecraft generation, making the world stunning, and magical.
- **Structures**, additonal structures are added to make the previously barren overworld, feel a lot more alive and immersive.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 **MULTIPLAYER:**

This modpack was made for Multiplayer, specifically an upcoming server.

- **VoiceChat**, allowing you to talk to the friends around you in-game!
- **Waystones**, quick-travel between you and your friends!
- **Optimization**, making the process of running the modpack, even easier.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
